perIdAttrib.description: Person attributaire to insert payment for

rotId.description: File type of education declaration. If value not 0 it is a new type of declaration. If 0, it is for creating education file based on a previous declaration (cloning)

previousFileId.description: If based on a previous education file id, it is mandatory that rotId is 0

rotIdToUseForCloning.description: It needs to use rotId = 0 (use previous) in the new declaration create endpoint

rotIdFromPreviousDeclaration.description: For reference, this is the type of declaration in the previous file. However, to created new by cloning it, needs to use rotId variable

objectDescr.description: It is the object type description of the previous declaration.

perIdAttrib.description: Per id attributaire (parent). It must keep the same for cloning.

perIdBenef.description: Per id beneficiary (child). It must keep the same for cloning.

educationLevelId.description: Education level ID. It must keep the same for cloning.

previousFileId.description: Per id previous education file ID. It must keep the same for cloning.

countryCode.description: Country code of previous education file ID. It must keep the same for cloning.

previousDeclarationDateFrom.description: Date from as returned by Sysper from previous file. It is used only to show in Sysper for reference.

previousDeclarationDateTo.description: Date to as returned by Sysper from previous file. It is used only to show in Sysper for reference.

defaultDateFrom.description: Date from as returned by Sysper as default, but user can change for cloning. Default is 1 year after the date from of the previous declaration

defaultDateTo.description: Date to as returned by Sysper as default, but user can change for cloning. Default is 1 year after the date to of the previous declaration

searchBySchoolCity.description: Search by city (if contains this text), minimum 3 chars

searchBySchoolPostalCode.description: Search by postal code in that country

searchSchoolName.description: Search by school name (if contains this text)

typesOfEnrollmentId.description: Type of enrollment, check the possible values at /education/situation/options/ endpoint

hoursOptionSelected.description: Number of hours in the education situation

otherSituationMarried.description: If beneficiary of education is married

typeOfTrainingId.example: 31150 is for Obligatory traineeship forming an integral part of studies, list at reftype EDU_STGT

frequencyCode.example: 31054 for Annual, list at reftype EDU_PAYFRQ

rightId.description: RightId we want to search/insert/update/delete rights for. If inserting use as null, for other operations must be not null
